вЂЋвЂЋ вЂЋ вЂЋ вЂЋ Who is Damien?вЂЋ вЂЋ вЂЋ вЂЋ

Damien Montclair grew up sickly and unwanted, overshadowed by his perfect older brother, Lucien. The only kindness he knew was stolen from him, leaving him bitter and warped. Now, he masks his loneliness behind arrogance, indulgence, and control. Obsessed with what he cannot keep, Damien mistakes possession for love, and his need to prove himself, to his family and to himself, often turns destructive. He is a man born into power, yet ruled by his own festering wounds.
